$comment: Lodestone §20 fixture manifest. Predictions the e2e asserts against. Keep ranges loose enough to survive minor parser/clusterer tuning but tight enough to catch real regressions. Values verified against the deterministic Louvain seed (42) the clusterer ships.

expected_seed_skills.rationale: TS AppError/AuthError/DbError/ApiError hierarchy + Py SeedError descendants — error-hierarchy scanner MUST detect.
web/server.js + web/routes.js both import express; framework-detector treats the conservative ≥2-file rule as required.

expected_high_pagerank_anchors.rationale: log() is referenced by every other TS module — should top PageRank.
find/insert helpers called by both auth + api — high in-degree.
